2023-24 Princeton Tigers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 24-5 (12-2, 1st in Ivy MBB)

Coach: Mitch Henderson

PS/G: 77.1 (81st of 362)

PA/G: 66.6 (38th of 362)

SRS: 6.55 (96th of 362)

SOS: -1.60 (170th of 362)

ORtg: 117.1 (14th of 362)

DRtg: 101.3 (108th of 362)
